children.text: to provide Federal funding for personnel preparation, technical assistance, model demonstration projects, information dissemination, and studies and evaluations, in order to improve early intervention, educational, and transitional results for children with disabilities; and
to assist State educational agencies and local educational agencies in improving their education systems for children with disabilities.

children.label: C
children.text: a public charter school that is a local educational agency under State law;

children.label: E
children.text: a public agency not described in subparagraphs (A) through (D);

children.label: H
children.text: an Indian tribe or a tribal organization (as defined under ); orsection 5304 of title 25

children.label: I
children.text: a for-profit organization, if the Secretary finds it appropriate in light of the purposes of a particular competition for a grant, contract, or cooperative agreement under this part.

children.heading: Special rule
children.label: 2 Special rule
children.text: The Secretary may limit which eligible entities described in paragraph (1) are eligible for a grant, contract, or cooperative agreement under this part to 1 or more of the categories of eligible entities described in paragraph (1).
